A.text: Both the North and South Pacific are mostly warming.

B.text: The North Pacific is mostly warming, while the South Pacific is mostly cooling.

C.text: Both the North and South Pacific are mostly unchanged.

D.text: The North Pacific is mostly unchanged or cooling, while the South Pacific is mostly warming.

parsed.answer_value: The North Pacific is mostly unchanged or cooling, while the South Pacific is mostly warming.
parsed.rationale: The map shows the North Pacific with colors indicating cooling or unchanged temperatures, while the South Pacific shows warmer colors, indicating warming trends.
